name: skyyrose-flagship-theme
description: SkyyRose Flagship WordPress theme — local dev tooling

scripts.verify: npm run lint:php 2>&1 | grep -v 'No syntax errors' | head -20; echo 'PHP check done'
scripts.structure: find skyyrose-flagship -type f -not -path '*/.*' | wc -l && find skyyrose-flagship -type d -not -path '*/.*' | wc -l
